required_skills: Vector databases (Pinecone / Weaviate / Qdrant / Milvus / FAISS)
disqualifying_signals: Pure academic/research background without production deployment
AI experience limited to LangChain + OpenAI wrappers under 12 months
No production code written in last 18 months
Entire career at consulting firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini)
Primary expertise in CV, speech, or robotics without NLP/IR
key_responsibilities: Own the intelligence layer: ranking, retrieval, matching systems
Audit current BM25 + rule-based scoring system
Ship v2 ranking system with embeddings + hybrid retrieval + LLM re-ranking
Build evaluation infrastructure (offline benchmarks, A/B testing, feedback loops)
Drive long-term candidate-JD matching architecture at scale
ideal_candidate_summary: 6-8 years total, 4-5 in applied ML at product companies. Has shipped at least one end-to-end ranking/search/recommendation system at meaningful scale. Strong opinions on retrieval, evaluation, and LLM integration backed by real systems built.
culture_signals: Comfortable with ambiguity and fast change
